Document:
# Rule 8: Character Names Use a sensible, unique, roleplay-friendly character name including a first and last name. Short, sensible nicknames within the name are allowed (e.g., Derek "Double D" Donahue, Jane "Breaker" Sanchez). Other character names should not be used, including your in-game username. You may be a sibling of another player's character; however, you may not play as another player's character. An administrator has the final say on whether a name is acceptable or not. - Names containing ranks, titles, honorifics, offensive names, celebrity names, and pop culture-related names are not allowed. - Roman numerals are permissible but should be used sparingly. - Nicknames should not be written in all caps. - Nicknames should be a maximum of two words. - Names and nicknames must not be considered memes, be offensive, contain 18+ content, etc. - Xenomorph prefixes must also follow these rules.
## Acceptable Names - Arthur Walker - Jeremy Bennett - Becky Jones
## Examples of Unacceptable Names and Callsigns - "Tightass" - Adolf Hitler - Donald Trump - "Nazi" - Mike Rotch (This is an example of a name that sounds vulgar when spoken aloud) - David Weyland - Ellen Ripley - Names that are puns of a sexual nature/references to banned words/topics.
## Exceptions A name comprised of extremely common names (e.g., John Williams) may be justifiable if used in conjunction with someone notable, provided the player is not attempting to impersonate or overtly reference the associated individual.
